events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th to the inimitable Brian May! His iconic guitar work with Queen shaped generations of rock music. What's your favourite May solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Still got the moves like Jagger! The one and only Mick Jagger is 83 today. What's your top Rolling Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: MTV's Debut
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed music forever! Its first video, 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles, was ironically prophetic. Did you tune in?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis' debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released on August 29, 1994, becoming a Britpop landmark.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' – an album that defined a generation. Which track from their debut still gets you going?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music and Art Fair, a three-day festival of peace and music, began on August 15, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: On this day in 1969, half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. A truly legendary moment in music history. Were you there in spirit?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the one and only King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, today. His music and legacy continue to inspire. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Jimi Hendrix would have been 84
events.blurb: Remembering guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970, and would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar God Tribute
angles.copy: A tribute to the incomparable Jimi Hendrix today. His revolutionary guitar playing would have been 84 this year. What's his most electrifying song for you?

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: On this day in 1969, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is one of the most famous in history! What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Hynde's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and attitude with The Pretenders are timeless. What's your favourite song from her?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman and solo artist Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Our kid is 54 today! Happy Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Liam moment, solo or with Oasis?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: iPod Revolution
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple gave us the first iPod, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changing how we listen to music forever. Did you own one of the originals?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the release date of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From the gadgets to the theme tunes, 007 is a true icon. Who's your favourite Bond and why?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, co-founder of The Beatles, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His message of peace and incredible music live on. What's your favourite Lennon song?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: Legendary comedian and actor John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Icon
angles.copy: And now for something completely different... Happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true comedy legend. What's his funniest moment?
